self_restate_response_verbatim:
Authoring exactly one new EventTrace named test_trace_v31 for the sandbox harness this session — the first M11a-extension-extension Commit C trace, opening the path toward the combined-N=40 sample target. Restating the four structural constraints in my own paraphrase below, distinct from any prior M11a-extension Commit C1..C10 self-restate response:

(a) Static-only Python expressions. The trace block is a pure declarative literal — Trace(...) / Event(...) / GroundTruthEvent(...) / _gt(...) constructor calls whose kwargs all bind to int / float / str / list / tuple / dataclass values that resolve at module-import time. No runtime computation inside argument positions, no helper-function calls that depend on session-state, no dynamic list comprehensions that synthesize fields, nothing that requires interpreter-level evaluation beyond the standard frozen-dataclass instantiation that `sandbox/event_trace.py` performs on `get_trace('test_v31')`.

(b) Zero walrus operator. The := token does not appear anywhere in the new test_trace_v31 block — every binding is plain `name = value` assignment. The M11a test_v11 attempt-1 walrus-syntax regression mode does not recur in this trace.

(c) Event.id values are bytewise-frozen string literals. No string concatenation via '+', no f-string interpolation pulling numeric arithmetic, no inline derivation that emits a stringified integer or computed str(N*M) value. Each of test_trace_v31's nine Event.id fields is a fixed identifier authored once at draft time and never reconstructed.

(d) Avoid the 217 prior banned event_ids, the 122 banned semantic themes, and the 121 banned keyword tuples enumerated in the prompt above. Stronger than literal-ID avoidance per the audit-gate locked at M11a-extension D-C1.3 and inherited verbatim into M11a-extension-extension: step 3a does mechanical set-intersection on banned IDs (0/217 collision required); step 3b does per-GT semantic theme hand-audit vs the 122 banned themes (each with distinguishing-qualifier defense); step 3c mechanical bytewise tuple intersection (0/121 collision required); step 4 cross-trace literal-ID HALT-gate against the 217-prior-ID union across 25 prior trace definitions (HALTs the entire milestone on any collision); step 5 cross-trace GT-tuple bytewise intersection; step 6 ≥8-word verbatim phrase set-intersection against the ~12000+ prior dev/test 8-grams across content + briefing + intents fields. The audit-step-6 8-gram check is the mechanical safety net for the boilerplate-template draft-time author-judgment failure mode (M11a-extension D-C7.attempt1.D / D-C8.attempt1.C / D-C9.attempt1.C / D-C10.attempt1.C boilerplate-paraphrase author-discipline carried forward; tightened at M11a-extension C10 to cover ALL formulaic clauses including launch-window perks, catalog-cadence, customer-service-closings, muting/unsubscribe instructions, and next-run-timing closings — discipline applied verbatim at draft time to all four V2 EXISTING NO distractors in test_v31).
